description: First base64 character of signature.sig.signatures[1].key_fingerprint_spki_b64 (ML-DSA-65 SPKI) deterministically flipped while manifest.signing.signatures[1].key_fingerprint_spki_b64 is preserved. Surfaces at Check 1 step 7(b) cross-check via failV2 short-circuit; both algorithm_verdicts emit as fail per spec section 18.10.

modifications.mutation: signatures[1].key_fingerprint_spki_b64 first base64 character flipped (M to N alphabet rotation); manifest.signing.signatures[1].key_fingerprint_spki_b64 unchanged.
modifications.rationale: Spec section 18.7 step 2 mandates signature.sig and manifest.signing agree on key_fingerprint_spki_b64 per algorithm. A tampered signature.sig that disagrees with manifest.signing is a tampering signal detected BEFORE cryptographic verification.

expected_failures: check 1 (manifest signature): cross-check fails at step 7(b) -- signatures[1].key_fingerprint_spki_b64 disagrees with manifest.signing.signatures[1].key_fingerprint_spki_b64. algorithm_verdicts cardinality 2 with both fail (failV2 short-circuit per spec section 18.10).
